decisions.title: Grow Capability By Adding Tools, Not Rewriting The Loop
decisions.description: The loop stays the same while the registry expands from bash to read, write, and edit primitives. This teaches that tool schemas and dispatch are the stable extension point.
decisions.alternatives: Inlining tool logic inside the loop looks shorter at first, but it makes every new capability a control-flow change instead of a protocol addition.

zh.title: 通过加工具扩能力，而不是重写循环
zh.description: 循环本身保持不变，只把注册表从 bash 扩展到读写编辑工具。这样更能说明稳定的扩展点其实是工具协议。

ja.title: ループを書き換えずツール追加で能力を伸ばす
ja.description: ループ自体は変えず、登録表を bash から read/write/edit に広げます。安定した拡張点はツールプロトコルだと教えるためです。

decisions.title: Prefer Specialized File Tools Over Shell Tricks
decisions.description: Dedicated file tools make intent explicit and easier to constrain. They are easier to validate, explain, and eventually permission-gate than arbitrary shell commands.
decisions.alternatives: Pure bash can do everything, but it collapses many different intents into one opaque command surface.

zh.title: 优先使用专门文件工具，而不是 shell 小技巧
zh.description: 专门的文件工具会让意图更清晰，也更容易做校验、解释和权限控制。

ja.title: シェル技巧より専用ファイルツールを優先する
ja.description: 専用ファイルツールは意図を明示しやすく、検証や説明、将来的な権限制御も行いやすくなります。
